title: VanillaBee
description: VanillaBee is an optimized modpack designed for smooth and comfortable gameplay on vanilla Minecraft servers, preserving the pure vanilla experience while enhancing performance.
body:
VanillaBee is a carefully curated modpack focused on optimizing the vanilla Minecraft experience for versions 1.21.5 and above. It aims to enhance game performance and usability without altering the core vanilla gameplay, making it ideal for players who enjoy pure vanilla servers but want smoother performance and better quality of life features.

Features
Performance Enhancements: Includes Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and other cutting-edge optimization mods to reduce lag and improve FPS.

Visual Improvements: Adds subtle visual enhancements like Iris Shaders support, Particle Effects, and Variants-CIT without changing the vanilla style.

Quality of Life: Useful tools like WorldEdit, Litematica, Inventory Profile Next, and Better F3 for convenience in building and navigation.

Multiplayer Friendly: Mods like Entity Culling, Dynamic FPS, and More Culling reduce server and client load, ensuring smooth multiplayer sessions.

Customization: Supports mod configurations via Cloth Config API and provides in-game customization options.

Why use this modpack?
Perfect for players who want the best possible performance on vanilla servers.

Maintains the classic Minecraft feel without adding gameplay changes or new content.

Includes popular utility mods that enhance building and navigation without affecting vanilla gameplay.
